title: pyrus matudae
intro: Pyrus matudae, also known as the Mayan plum or Matud's plum, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to Mexico. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus matudae include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Pyrus matudae is commonly prepared as an infusion or a tincture, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
